notes: Saudi Arabia row/QID/photo audit 2026-05-24: verifier confirmed all 30 local rows match the Wikipedia 30-player preliminary squad table and QID identities; Saudi Pro League official squad/profile sources independently confirm the call-up and clubs. Official SPL profiles support DOB corrections for Hassan Kadesh (1992-09-26), Moteb Al-Harbi (2000-02-19), Abdullah Al-Hamdan (1999-09-12), and Khalid Al-Ghannam (2000-11-07), so those override the Wikipedia table while squad_table_date_of_birth preserves the table value. No clean Wikimedia portrait/P18/pageimage was found for 15 no-photo rows, which are marked reviewed-none; rejected Saleh Al-Shehri-looking Commons trails were wrong-person or copyright-deleted.
